title: 6 Monkeys Escaped a German Sanctuary by Scraping Through a Brick Wall
script: 6 rhesus macaques just escaped an animal sanctuary in Witten, Germany. The monkeys scraped mortar from a brick wall, brick by brick, until they could push through. Police spotted them across the city and set food traps. 3 were caught within 24 hours. 3 are still on the loose. Authorities say the animals pose no danger — but they haven't caught them yet. Residents have been warned.
